title: Should we add lidocaine to Aqualyx？
filename: Should we add lidocaine to Aqualyx？.en.vtt
excerpt: Do i add lidocaine to aqualyx [Music] yes that's the way i was trained so a small amount of lidocaine with the aquilix may make the procedure more comfortable during the administration phase perhaps certainly a bit more comfortable afterwards because you get that period of anesth…

segments.text: do i add lidocaine to aqualyx [Music] yes that's the way i was trained so a small amount of lidocaine with the aquilix may make the procedure more comfortable during the administration phase perhaps certainly a bit more comfortable afterwards because you get that period of anesthesia when the post procedure inflammation is probably at its highest and it should make the procedure a little bit more comfortable for patients in totality it's debatable in the early stages because i know lidocaine when you first inject it does cause a bit of stinging but obviously then it numbs the tissue quite soon afterwards um but that's certainly the way i was trained and that's the way i've done it ever since so yes i do add lidocaine to aqualyx
